Luos on this Community X I know you're Rattled by #SisiNdioSifuna That is going Viral across the Country.. You can as well Viral #SisiNdioBabu if you want. Your Bitterness is now Going Viral than Baada ya Baba Babu Bila Babu Tabu. You and Kaluma of these days still holds the View that Mluhya lazima atawaliwe na Mjaluo.. my Cousins, those days are gone. For the Record, EDWIN SIFUNA was the first person to say in public that He was supporting Babu Owino for Nairobi Gubernatorial seat 2027. Babu Owino on the other Hand has never Declared his support for Edwin Sifuna for anything..so between these Two who is supportive and a Team player. Some of you I can see you're becoming Emotional retards. You're Fattening Babu Owino for Slaughter. You will soon Kill his political ambitions by making him over ambitious. Nairobi is not Kogelo, Nairobi is Nairobi and politics of Nairobi must not be mixed with Emotions of Kogelo... Stop Daring us with useless threats, Edwin Sifuna has never Rode on Babu Owino clout Sifuna is a Self made Brand based on his Track Record. If you think that Babu is too Big let him Distance himself from Sifuna, go to ODM and become the party Leader.... But us who Believe in better Kenya we shall put up with Sifuna to the End.
